message:
fix: Remove require() from ES module to fix swarm monitor error

- Fixed 'require is not defined' error in swarm.js
- Replaced require('fs') with proper ES module import
- Already imported readFileSync at top of file
- Fixes issue reported by users with global installation
- Version bump to 2.0.0-alpha.112

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 #!/bin/sh
 # Claude-Flow Smart Dispatcher - Detects and uses the best available runtime
 
-VERSION="2.0.0-alpha.110"
+VERSION="2.0.0-alpha.111"
 
 # Determine the correct path based on how the script is invoked
 if [ -L "$0" ]; then

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "claude-flow",
-  "version": "2.0.0-alpha.111",
+  "version": "2.0.0-alpha.112",
   "description": "Enterprise-grade AI agent orchestration with ruv-swarm integration (Alpha Release)",
   "mcpName": "io.github.ruvnet/claude-flow",
   "main": "cli.mjs",
